{{Quote|You think you can shoot it, once everything's hooked up?|Mekkar Doan to Tenn Graneet on the DS-1 Orbital Battle Station's superlaser|<ref name="DSn" />}}
'''Mekkar Doan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chief Petty Officer/Legends|chief petty officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] assigned to [[Superlaser Fire Control]] on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. There, he was employed at the main control console of the tractor beam, where he worked with Fleet Gunnery Officer [[Tenn Graneet]].

{{Char-stub}}
